description: Style NoteThis remanika blouson top with its orange and teal machine embroidery is definitely an attention grabber. Accessorise with beaded bracelets and embellished sandals in order to create a bold and colourful style statement.Product DetailsMacaw green blouson top with short puff sleeves and a gathered boat neckline, machine embroidery and lace detail on chest, baby overlocked sleeve hem and necklineMaterial and Care100% cottonHand wash onlyDo not bleachFlat dryCool ironSize and FitLoose fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
